analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.averageResponseTimeHelp: The average time a human agent takes to reply to a customer's message.

analytics.averageFirstResponseTimeByAdminHelp: The average time a human agent takes to provide the initial reply to a customer's message.

analytics.averageDurationOfConversationHelp: It is the average time a conversation has been handled by a human before being moved to the bot.

assignedConversations.title: Assigned Conversations
assignedConversations.helpText: Conversations assigned from the inbox or by the bot.

analytics.messagesReceivedByTheBotHelp: Messages sent by your contacts that your bot successful understood or failed to understand. It doesn't include messages when live chat is enabled.
analytics.uniqueConversationsByAdminsHelp: Number of contacts that an admin sent at least a single message.
analytics.newContactsBySourceHelp: How your contacts are reaching your bot.
analytics.assignedConversationsByAdminsHelp: Conversations assigned from the inbox or by the bot.
analytics.followUpConversationsHelp: Conversations marked as follow-up from the inbox or by the bot.

broadcasts.title: Broadcasts
broadcasts.description: Send messages to your contacts in real-time or schedule them for later. You can send messages to all contacts, a specific list of contacts, or a specific contact.

messengerList.title: Messenger List
messengerList.description: May contain promotions, and it will send only to people that subscribed to your Messenger list.

messengerActiveContacts.title: Messenger Active Contacts
messengerActiveContacts.description: May contain promotions and will only be sent to users who messaged your bot within the last 24h.

messengerAccountUpdate.title: Messenger Account Update
messengerAccountUpdate.description: Notify the user of a non-recurring change to their application or account.

messengerConfirmedEventUpdate.title: Messenger Confirmed Event Update
messengerConfirmedEventUpdate.description: Send the user reminders or updates for an event they have registered for (e.g., purchased tickets). This tag may be used for upcoming events and events in progress.

messengerPostPurchaseUpdate.title: Messenger Post Purchase Update
messengerPostPurchaseUpdate.description: Notify the user of an update on a recent purchase. Confirmation of transaction, such as invoices or receipts, Notifications of shipment status, such as product in-transit, shipped, delivered, or delayed.

allContacts.title: All Contacts
allContacts.description: Send a flow to all contacts.

messengerList.title: Messenger List
messengerList.description: Build your list and send daily broadcasts to increase engagement and sales. It can be time-sensitive marketing campaigns, drip campaigns, promotions...

facebookCommentAutomation.title: Facebook Comment Automations
facebookCommentAutomation.description: Get more customers and increase sales while saving your time by automatically replying to Facebook comments.

facebookLeadAdsAutomation.title: Facebook Lead Ads Automations
facebookLeadAdsAutomation.description: Sell more and get better customers by auto-qualifying your Facebook or Instagram leads on WhatsApp.

qrCodeGenerator.title: QR Code Generator
qrCodeGenerator.description: Generate QR codes to help your customers quickly start a conversation with your business in physical locations.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Templates allow you to quickly copy flows and other content to other accounts.

appointmentScheduling.title: Appointments Scheduling
appointmentScheduling.description: Let your contacts easily book an appointment with you.

questionnaires.title: Questionnaires
questionnaires.description: Quickly conduct surveys and quizzes with real-time feedback on results.

ecommerce.title: Ecommerce
ecommerce.description: Let your customers buy your products inside your bot.

placesNearMe.title: Places Near Me
placesNearMe.description: Let your customers easily find your business locations near them.

pollManager.title: Poll Manager
pollManager.description: Conduct polling or voting systems. You can use it to collect customers opinions also.

botSimulator.title: Bot Simulator
botSimulator.description: Bot Simulator allows you to show the bot working on any website without adding any code.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.description: Notify your system when some events occur inside your bot. You can use webhooks to transfer data to your system.

reflinks.title: Entry Point Links
reflinks.description: Share your bot on websites, social media platforms, or other messaging apps as an entry point for users to start a conversation with the bot.

chatbotToken.title: ChatbotX API Access Token
chatbotToken.description: Generate a token to allow your chatbot to access ChatbotX APIs. Keep this token secret and do not share it with anyone.
